career-1.text: What will my career development look like in the next 5 years? Any key opportunities I should focus on?

career-2.text: How's my career fortune in 2025? Is it suitable for making major decisions?

career-3.text: Can our career paths complement each other? How can we collaborate effectively?

career-4.text: Which factors in my birth chart significantly influence my career? How can I leverage these advantages?

job-1.text: What type of job suits me best?

job-2.text: How do our professional strengths and weaknesses complement each other? Could we work well together?

change-1.text: Is this a good year to change jobs? Which month has the best opportunities?

change-2.text: If I change jobs, what type of company or position should I choose?

change-3.text: How would a career change for one of us impact our relationship or family dynamics?

relation-1.text: Will I encounter difficult people this year? How can I handle them?

relation-2.text: How can I improve relationships with leaders and colleagues?

relation-3.text: How can I avoid workplace conflicts and disputes?

startup-1.text: Am I suitable for entrepreneurship? If so, what's the best field?

startup-2.text: Is now a good time to start a business?

startup-3.text: Are we compatible as business partners? What challenges might we face?

startup-4.text: What risks should I be aware of in business or investment? How to avoid them?

balance-1.text: How can we balance our career ambitions with our relationship or family life?

specific-career-1.text: I have a new project, will it be successful?

specific-career-2.text: Am I compatible with a potential business partner?

specific-career-3.text: Should I change my current job?

specific-career-4.text: How will our different work schedules or career demands affect our relationship?

zodiac-1.text: What's my Chinese zodiac sign and its significance?

zodiac-2.text: What are the key characteristics of my birth year animal?

zodiac-3.text: How do our Chinese zodiac signs interact? What does this reveal about our relationship?

personality-1.text: How does my zodiac sign shape my personality and behavior?

personality-2.text: What are my strengths and weaknesses according to my zodiac sign?

personality-3.text: Which careers or life paths align best with my zodiac sign?

personality-4.text: How do our personality traits complement or challenge each other based on our zodiac signs?

compatibility-1.text: Which zodiac signs am I most compatible with for relationships?

compatibility-2.text: How compatible are our Chinese zodiac signs? What strengths and challenges does this create?

compatibility-3.text: How can we improve our relationship based on our zodiac compatibility?

compatibility-4.text: Which zodiac signs should I be cautious about in relationships or business?

forecast-1.text: How will the current year affect my zodiac sign?

forecast-2.text: What are my lucky elements, colors, and numbers based on my zodiac?

forecast-3.text: How will my fortune change in the next zodiac cycle?

forecast-4.text: How will this year's energies affect us as a couple with our specific zodiac combination?

elements-1.text: What is my birth element and how does it influence me?

elements-2.text: How does the Five Element theory relate to my zodiac sign?

elements-3.text: What's the most effective way to balance my Five Elements?

elements-4.text: How do our birth elements interact? Do they create harmony or conflict?

elements-5.text: How can we use our elemental energies to strengthen our relationship?

health-1.text: What does my birth chart indicate about my overall health?

health-2.text: Which aspects of my health should I pay special attention to this year?

health-3.text: How do our health constitutions interact? Can we help balance each other's health tendencies?

constitution-1.text: What is my body constitution according to Chinese medicine?

constitution-2.text: Which organs or systems need special care based on my birth chart?

constitution-3.text: How do our different body constitutions complement or challenge each other?

prevention-1.text: What preventive health measures should I take this year?

prevention-2.text: Which health risks am I most susceptible to?

prevention-3.text: What dietary adjustments would benefit my health?

prevention-4.text: How can we support each other's health goals and create a wellness-focused household?

personal-2.text: What does my birth chart reveal about my life path?

personal-3.text: Which of the Five Elements is most beneficial for me?

personal-4.text: When will major life changes occur in my destiny?

personal-5.text: What colors should I wear to enhance my personal energy?

love-1.text: What does my birth chart reveal about my love life and romantic tendencies?

love-2.text: How will my love life develop in the next year? What opportunities or challenges might I face?

love-3.text: What are my strengths and weaknesses in relationships according to my birth chart?

love-4.text: What type of partner would complement my personality based on my birth chart?

love-compatibility-1.text: How compatible are we based on our birth charts? What are our strengths and challenges as a couple?

love-compatibility-2.text: What does our elemental compatibility reveal about our relationship dynamics?

love-compatibility-3.text: How do our personalities complement or challenge each other according to Chinese astrology?

love-compatibility-4.text: What can we learn from each other based on our birth charts?

relationship-1.text: What does Chinese astrology reveal about the current state of our relationship?

relationship-2.text: How can we improve communication and understanding in our relationship?

relationship-3.text: What challenges might we face in our relationship this year and how can we overcome them?

relationship-4.text: How can we strengthen our bond and deepen our connection?

future-1.text: When am I most likely to meet a significant romantic partner?

future-2.text: What will my next relationship be like according to my birth chart?

future-3.text: How will our relationship evolve in the coming years?

future-4.text: What major milestones might we experience in our relationship journey?

marriage-1.text: Is this year favorable for marriage or engagement according to my birth chart?

marriage-2.text: What does Chinese astrology indicate about our marriage compatibility?

marriage-3.text: How can we build a strong foundation for a lasting marriage?

marriage-4.text: What insights does my birth chart provide about my approach to marriage and commitment?

specific-love-1.text: Why do I keep attracting the same type of partners?

specific-love-2.text: How can I heal from past relationship trauma according to my birth chart?

specific-love-3.text: Is my current partner my soulmate according to Chinese astrology?

specific-love-4.text: Should we take our relationship to the next level?
